Unlike traditional TV, where viewers follow fixed programming schedules, connected TVs allow users to discover and enjoy content in a more personalized way. sources.excerpt: Research firm Omdia says that the PC market grew by 3% in in the last quarter of 2025 due to holiday sales and the Windows 10 EOL. Unfortunately, 2026 is expected to be a rough year with an expected 13% contraction in sales due to the chip shortages.

sources.title: Modder gets Intel's OEM-only 'Bartlett Lake' CPU to post on a regular Asus Z790 motherboard — BIOS was edited by Claude AI to make Core Ultra 9 273QPE boot
sources.excerpt: An enthusiast has managed to get Intel's non-consumer Bartlett Lake CPU running on a regular Z790 motherboard, thanks to AI. Claude modded the original BIOS of the board to detect a Core 9 273QPE and boot with it, but the setup hasn't gotten past the POST screen yet, and the modder is currently facing various error codes.

sources.title: Causal Inference for AMS Design (U. of Florida)
sources.excerpt: A new technical paper, “Causal AI For AMS Circuit Design: Interpretable Parameter Effects Analysis,” was published by the University of Florida. Abstract “Analog-mixed-signal (AMS) circuits are highly non-linear and operate on continuous real-world signals, making them far more difficult to model with data-driven AI than digital blocks. To close the gap between structured design data...
